confirmed: The current Stability Pool program invocation stream is much deeper than the current derived pool-account history.
Public program history is currently recovered back to at least 2025-12-27 local time, so 2026-01-01 is inside the visible window.
The exact March 29 buy pattern is: HysTab Instruction RebalanceStableToLever followed by HYEXCH Instruction SwapStableToLever.
not_yet_confirmed: A clean extracted set of pre-2026-03-27 buy_xsol events.
Whether the same current public stream reaches all the way to 2026-01-01 without switching methods.
early_sample_read: Sampled late-February and mid-January transactions so far look like UserDeposit or UserWithdraw flow with external swaps, not the March 29 rebalance-buy pattern.
That is preliminary negative evidence, not a full exclusion of older buy events.
